components.title: Accordion
components.description: Collapsible panels with a compound API (trigger, indicator, content). Defaults align with HeroUI v3 — text-sm triggers, muted body, motion tokens, optional surface shell.

variants.subtitle: Full-width accordion with hairline separators and no outer chrome (HeroUI `variant="default"`). Triggers use 14px / font-medium; body uses muted 14px text; chevron 250ms; panel 200ms.
Rounded 24px surface (`RiseAccordionDecorations.surface`), wider padding, inset separators — HeroUI `variant="surface"`.
Plus, caret, and arrow rows — each uses a custom indicator child.
Page title, subtitle, section labels (General, Licensing, …) and one `RiseAccordion` per section — HeroUI FAQ story.
Rich triggers: title + subtitle in the trigger row; body in `RiseAccordionContent`.

components.title: Alert
components.description: Status messages with indicator, title, description, and optional actions — aligned with @heroui/react Alert, alert.tsx, and alert.css.

variants.subtitle: Default informational alert on a surface card.
Accent-colored title and icon with an action.
Error state with bullet list and retry.
Multiple buttons in the alert footer.

components.title: Avatar
components.description: Circular profile image, initials, or custom child — sized like HeroUI size-8 · size-10 · size-12, with semantic colors and solid vs soft fallback surfaces (HeroUI avatar.css / @heroui/react Avatar).

variants.subtitle: Network image, initials from `name`, or a custom `child`.
Solid fallbacks: default, accent, success, warning, danger.
`solid` vs `soft` letter fallbacks for each color.
Any widget as `child` (clipped to the circle).

components.title: Button
components.description: Clickable button with HeroUI v3 variants, sizes, icons, loading, and full width — aligned with @heroui/react and `button.css` (rounded-3xl, gap-2, press scale 0.97).

variants.subtitle: Primary, secondary, tertiary, outline, ghost, danger, danger soft.
Leading icon + label in a row.
Outline + `fullWidth` stacked rows (swap icons for brand assets — no separate social primitive).
Compose `child` with `RiseButtonLabel` for variant-colored text (e.g. icon + label + muted suffix).

components.title: CloseButton
components.description: Compact control for closing dialogs, modals, or dismissing content — aligned with @heroui/react CloseButton (heroui.com/docs/react/components/close-button) and close-button.css (inline-flex, rounded-xl, press scale).

variants.subtitle: Default dismiss control; wraps RiseButton with tertiary · sm · icon-only defaults.
Replace the default Icons.close via child, or tune iconProps for size/color.
Same component wired to local state.

components.title: Chip
components.description: Small informational badges for labels, statuses, and categories — aligned with @heroui/react Chip (heroui.com/docs/react/components/chip) and chip.css (rounded-2xl, compound colors × variants).

variants.subtitle: Semantic colors with the default soft style (HeroUI Usage row).
Variant × color matrix at md size — primary, secondary, tertiary, soft.
Typical status and release labels using semantic colors.

components.title: Card
components.description: Rounded container with HeroUI variants (transparent, default, secondary, tertiary) and compound slots for header, title, description, content, and footer — see [Card](https://heroui.com/docs/react/components/card), [card.tsx](https://github.com/heroui-inc/heroui/blob/v3/packages/react/src/components/card/card.tsx), and [card.css](https://github.com/heroui-inc/heroui/blob/v3/packages/styles/components/card.css).

variants.subtitle: Header, title, description, content, and footer with a primary action.
Row with media placeholder and stacked copy (responsive pattern).
Stacked fields and actions inside the card.

components.title: TagGroup
components.description: Selectable tag list with sizes, variants, removal, and field chrome — aligned with HeroUI TagGroup (heroui.com/docs/react/components/tag-group) and tag-group.css.

variants.subtitle: Multi-select tags with accent selection styling.
Whole group disabled, or per-tag disabledKeys.
Leading icon per tag via leadingBuilder.
onRemove removes items from the list.

components.title: Slider
components.description: Single and range sliders with label/output row, vertical layout, and HeroUI-aligned track styling — see heroui.com/docs/react/components/slider and slider.css.

variants.subtitle: Label, value output, and accent track (default 0–100).
Two thumbs with combined output (e.g. price band).

components.title: Skeleton
components.description: Loading placeholders with shimmer (default), pulse, or static fill; optional synchronized shimmer host — aligned with HeroUI [Skeleton](https://heroui.com/docs/react/components/skeleton), [skeleton.tsx](https://github.com/heroui-inc/heroui/blob/v3/packages/react/src/components/skeleton/skeleton.tsx), and [skeleton.css](https://github.com/heroui-inc/heroui/blob/v3/packages/styles/components/skeleton.css).

variants.subtitle: Panel with stacked placeholder blocks (default shimmer).
Shimmer, pulse, and none side by side.
RiseSkeletonSyncShimmer — one phase shared across children.

components.title: Spinner
components.description: Loading indicator with HeroUI-aligned sizes (sm–xl), semantic colors including current (inherits icon/text color), and continuous rotation — see [Spinner](https://heroui.com/docs/react/components/spinner), [spinner.tsx](https://github.com/heroui-inc/heroui/blob/v3/packages/react/src/components/spinner/spinner.tsx), and [spinner.css](https://github.com/heroui-inc/heroui/blob/v3/packages/styles/components/spinner.css).

variants.subtitle: sm, md, lg, xl — match HeroUI size tokens.

components.title: Surface
components.description: Semantic containers with default, secondary, tertiary, and transparent variants, plus RiseSurfaceScope for child context — aligned HeroUI [Surface](https://heroui.com/docs/react/components/surface), [surface.tsx](https://github.com/heroui-inc/heroui/blob/v3/packages/react/src/components/surface/surface.tsx), and [surface.css](https://github.com/heroui-inc/heroui/blob/v3/packages/styles/components/surface.css).

variants.subtitle: primary (default), secondary, tertiary, transparent — with on-surface copy.
Nested inputs use secondary field variant on a default surface (Hero pattern).

components.title: Switch
components.description: Boolean toggle with sizes, label placement, optional description and thumb icons, plus SwitchGroup layouts — aligned with HeroUI Switch (heroui.com/docs/react/components/switch), switch.tsx, and switch.css.

variants.subtitle: Label with control (default: label after track).
Label before vs after the control.

components.title: Tabs
components.description: Tab list + panels with primary/secondary variants and vertical layout — aligned with @heroui/react Tabs, tabs.tsx, and tabs.css.

variants.subtitle: Primary horizontal tabs with segment indicator.
Primary tabs along the leading edge.
Underline indicator on a transparent bar.
Leading border and accent stroke on the active tab.
Many tabs in the secondary style.

components.title: Checkbox
components.description: Selection control with label/description slot, indeterminate, invalid, and variants (primary/secondary) — aligned with HeroUI Checkbox and checkbox.css.

components.title: Description
components.description: Supplementary helper text for form fields — aligned with HeroUI Description and description.css.

components.title: FieldError
components.description: Validation error text for form fields with danger styling and accessibility semantics — aligned with HeroUI FieldError and field-error.css.

variants.subtitle: Simple error line under a field.
Message content changes with input value.

components.title: Label
components.description: Accessible form label with required, disabled, and invalid states — aligned with HeroUI Label and label.css.

components.title: Popover
components.description: Anchored rich-content overlay with placement, arrow, and interactive content — aligned with @heroui/react Popover, popover.tsx, and popover.css.

variants.subtitle: Top, right, bottom, and left anchors.
Focusable content with actions inside the popover.
Use any custom widget as trigger.

components.title: RadioGroup
components.description: Single-choice selection with orientation, variants, disabled and invalid states — aligned with HeroUI RadioGroup and radio-group.css.

variants.subtitle: Options laid out in a row/wrap.

components.title: SearchField
components.description: Search input with leading icon, clear button, validation, and variants — aligned with HeroUI SearchField and search-field.css.

components.title: Select
components.description: Collapsible option selector with field chrome, validation states, and variants — aligned with HeroUI Select and select.css.

components.title: Scroll shadow
components.description: Edge fade overlays when content overflows — aligned with HeroUI ScrollShadow, scroll-shadow.tsx, and scroll-shadow.css (vertical / horizontal, size, offset, hide scrollbar, visibility).

variants.subtitle: Vertical list: fades at the top and/or bottom when there is more content.
Hero hideScrollBar — thumb and track hidden for Material scrollbars.
Hero size prop (fade extent in logical pixels, default 40).
onVisibilityChange when visibility is auto (both · top · bottom · none for vertical).
ScrollShadow inside a padded RiseSurface shell.

components.title: Separator
components.description: Dividers with HeroUI tones (standard, secondary, tertiary), horizontal and vertical orientation, optional centered label, and surface-aware contrast — see [Separator](https://heroui.com/docs/react/components/separator), [separator.tsx](https://github.com/heroui-inc/heroui/blob/v3/packages/react/src/components/separator/separator.tsx), and [separator.css](https://github.com/heroui-inc/heroui/blob/v3/packages/styles/components/separator.css).

variants.subtitle: Horizontal rule under intro copy; link row with vertical separators.
1px vertical line between row items (bounded height).
RiseLabeledSeparator — muted label between growing lines.
standard, secondary, and tertiary line contrast.
Separators on default / secondary / tertiary RiseSurface shells.

components.title: Input
components.description: Primitive single-line input with variants, input types, controlled state, and full width — aligned with HeroUI Input and input.css.

components.title: InputGroup
components.description: Grouped input controls with prefix/suffix slots for icons, text, and actions — aligned with HeroUI InputGroup and input-group.css.

variants.subtitle: Currency and unit styling around input.

components.title: InputOTP
components.description: One-time passcode input with grouped slots, validation states, and completion callbacks — aligned with HeroUI InputOTP and input-otp.css.

components.title: TextField
components.description: Label, input, helper, and error in one field — aligned with @heroui/react TextField, textfield.tsx, and textfield.css.

variants.subtitle: Email-style field with label and placeholder.
Invalid state hides helper and shows error.
Static invalid state with FieldError-style copy.
Several rows inside the same TextField API.
Stacked fields that stretch to the container.
Secondary variant on a surface background.

components.title: TextArea
components.description: Multiline text input with HeroUI-style field tokens, rows, variants, and full width — aligned with @heroui/react TextArea and textarea.css.

variants.subtitle: Live character count with max length.
Short vs taller default row counts.
